description: Production needs to increase the quantity of a component on a purchase order that has already been submitted but not yet shipped.

nodes.task_description: Find the original purchase order and verify its status is 'Submitted' or 'Acknowledged'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the PO and confirms it has not shipped yet.

nodes.task_description: Create a PO amendment to change the quantity on the relevant line item.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a change order request for the PO.

nodes.task_description: Send the amended PO to the supplier and request confirmation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the revised PO and awaits acknowledgement from the supplier.
